items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of agent-specific rate limits, but the evidence provided does not include any details or results related to this specific functionality. While there are prior steps that confirm customer sign-up and booking processes, they do not address the expected behavior of the agent-specific rate limits. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to determine whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report.
